## Meeting Purpose

[Review blog performance, discuss content strategy, and address technical issues related to blog publishing and author profiles.](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [U.S. leads have higher conversion rates and value compared to international leads](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focus on creating content for enterprise-level clients, moving away from Shopify-centric content](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Improve CTAs and create more industry-specific content to boost conversions](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Address UTM tracking and author profile concerns for better analytics and credibility](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)

## Topics

### Lead Quality Analysis

  - [U.S. leads show higher conversion rates and value compared to international leads](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Demo forms indicate higher intent than free trials or gated content](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Shopify-related content generates many leads but doesn't align well with enterprise focus](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### High-Converting Content Strategy

  - [Focus on luxury brand content, executive-level pieces, and industry-specific articles](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Create more content on video commerce, ROI calculators, and executive guides](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Develop a content calendar considering seasonal trends and industry focus](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### SEO and Keyword Strategy

  - [Create comparison and alternatives content for better commercial intent](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Focus on enterprise-level competitors like Syndigo and Bazaarvoice](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Move away from the term "live shopping platform" to avoid limitations](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Use terms like "video commerce solution," "AI-powered," or "24/7 video showroom"](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)

### Blog Performance and Technical Issues

  - [Impressions vs. clicks mismatch is an industry-wide trend, not a major concern](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [Focus on improving click-to-trial conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1274.0)
  - [Address Webflow publishing issues to clear backlog of unpublished articles](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Implement year-agnostic URLs for evergreen content with proper redirects](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### Author Profiles and Blog Attribution

  - [Replace AI-generated author profiles with real employee profiles](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Use existing employee profiles for blog post attribution](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
  - [Implement a rotation system for author attribution to maintain variety](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=2365.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Conduct competitor keyword analysis focusing on enterprise-level players](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [Develop 10-15 potential blog post ideas based on new keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Continue publishing backlogged articles and address Webflow issues](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1960.0)
  - [Implement real employee profiles for blog post attribution](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
  - [Create a content calendar for upcoming months](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Improve CTAs on existing high-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Explore the creation of dedicated comparison landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/HZ78frL6wVFaGJZRWKm5_K8Hy_u8ac6e?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
